case_title: THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. SEAVIEW INSURANCE COMPANY

docket_entries.description: SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT SEAVIEW INSURANCE COMPANY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SEAVIEW INSURANCE COMPANY $20,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $370.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $20,370.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

NOTICE OF SEAVIEW INSURANCE COMPANYS MOTION AND MOTION TO SET ASIDE SUMMARY JUDGMENT AND VACATE FORFEITURE AND EXONERATE BAIL BOND PURUSANT TO PENAL CODE SECTION 1306C (TRANSACTION ID # 15215052) FILED BY DEFENDANT SEAVIEW INSURANCE COMPANY HEARING SET FOR SEP-21-2015 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES IN SUPPORT OF SEAVIEW INSURANCE COMPANYS MOTION TO SET ASIDE SUMMARY JUDGMENT AND VACATE FORFEITURE AND EXONERATE BAIL BOND PURSUANT TO PENAL CODE SECTION 1306C (TRANSACTION ID # 15215052) FILED BY DEFENDANT SEAVIEW INSURANCE COMPANY
COURT REPORTING SERVICES LESS THAN 1 HOUR (TRANSACTION ID # 15215052) FILED BY DEFENDANT SEAVIEW INSURANCE COMPANY
PROOF OF SERVICE (TRANSACTION ID # 15215052) FILED BY DEFENDANT SEAVIEW INSURANCE COMPANY
ORDER TO SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT , ORDER SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR TERMS OF ORDER SETTING ASIDE SUMMARY JUDGMENT JUDGMENT OF JUL-07-2015 SET ASIDE

NON-OPPOSITION TO DEFENDANTS MOTION TO SET ASIDE SUMMARY JUDGMENT; DISCHARGE FORFEITURE AND EXONERATE BAIL PURSUANT TO PENAL CODE SECTION 1306(C) (TRANSACTION ID # 57774358) FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA
MINI MINUTES FOR SEP-21-2015 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT SEAVIEW INSURANCE COMPANY'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE SUMMARY JUDGMENT AND VACATE FORFEITURE AND EXONERATE BAIL BOND PURUSANT TO PENAL CODE SECTION 1306C IS GRANTED, STATEMENT OF NON-OPPOSITION FILED. MOVING PARTY TO PREPARE FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER : MELANIE GHENO, CSR # 7489 =302/EG

Notice Of Seaview Insurance Companys Motion And Motion To Set Aside Summary Judgment And Vacate Forfeiture And Exonerate Bail Bond Purusant To Penal Code Section 1306c
Off Calendar Sep-21-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT SEAVIEW INSURANCE COMPANY'S Motion To Set Aside Summary Judgment And Vacate Forfeiture And Exonerate Bail Bond Purusant To Penal Code Section 1306c is Granted, statement of non-opposition filed.
